name: wiki-drawer-mobile-nav
description: Slide-in overlay navigation for compact (≤799px) viewports. Hamburger trigger opens a full-height left drawer containing the wiki site nav. Uses HTML inert attribute to lock the background DOM.
research_notes: inert attribute: ~94% global native support (Aug 2025). iOS Safari from 15.5+.
WICG polyfill: ~3KB gzipped, maintenance mode since late 2023 but functional.
Strategy: native-first with conditional WICG polyfill: if (!('inert' in HTMLElement.prototype)) load polyfill.
CSS partial: pointer-events:none + user-select:none blocks mouse but NOT keyboard — do NOT use as inert substitute.
Drawer is only shown at compact (≤799px) — desktop users never see it.
html: • {{label}}
js_notes: On open: remove [hidden] from drawer + backdrop; set inert on #wiki-main-content and #wiki-header; update trigger aria-expanded. On close: add [hidden] back; remove inert from main/header. Escape key closes. Backdrop click closes.

variants.name: closed
variants.description: Hamburger button only; drawer and backdrop [hidden].

variants.name: open
variants.description: Drawer slides in; backdrop dims; main content inert.

aria: Trigger button: aria-expanded (true/false), aria-controls='wiki-drawer', aria-label updates on state. Backdrop: aria-hidden='true' always. Drawer <nav aria-label='Site navigation'>. inert applied to #wiki-main-content and any other focusable regions when drawer is open — prevents Tab from escaping drawer.
